verses.text: Sanggamte aw, Kha Siangtho' hong piak siamna a tuamtuamte tawh kisai thu na theihloh khak ding uh ka deih kei hi
Lawki na hih lai-un a pau theilo milimte' thu-in na gamta uh a, na lungsim uh tua milimte in hong zo mahmah hi

Tua ahih manin Kha Siangtho in lam a lah mite in, “Jesuh in samsiatna ngah ta hen,” a cihlohna, leh Kha Siangtho in lam lak kei leh kuamah in, “Jesuh pen Topa hi,” a cih theihlohna ding thu na theihding uh ahi hi
Tu-in siamna a nam tuamtuam om a, ahi zongin a hong pia Kha Siangtho a kibang ahi hi
Nasepna a nam tuamtuam om a, ahi zongin a na i sepsak Topa a kibang ahi hi
Nasepna ding siamna a nam tuamtuam om a, ahi zongin septheihna ding siamna a hong pia Pasian a kibang ahi hi
Mi khempeuh-a' dingin phattuamna a omtheihna dingin Kha Siangtho' hong ompihna a nam tuamtuamin hong kilang hi
Kha Siangtho in mi khat tungah thuthuk pilna hong guan' a, tua Kha Siangtho mah in adang khat tungah thugen siamna hong guan' hi
Adang khat tungah upna hong guan' a, adang khat tungah cina damsak theihna hong guan' hi

Adang khat tungah na lamdang bawl theihna, adang khat tungah Pasian' thu hilh ding siamna, adang khat tungah Kha Siangtho piak siamna ahi leh a hilo khentheihna ding siamna, adang khat tungah pau lamdang pau theihna, adang khat tungah tua pau lamdang tuamtuam paunate a khiatna gentheihna hong pia hi
Hih siamna a tuamtuamte a hong pia pen Kha Siangtho a kibang khat bek mah hi a, mi a tuamtuamte tungah ama hoihsak bangin a hong piak ahi hi.
Pumpi pen khat bek hinapi-in na a tuamtuam a nei hi. Pumpi in na a tuamtuam tampi a neih hangin pumpi khat bek mah ahih veve mah bangin Khrih zong pumpi na a tuamtuam a nei pumpi khat ahi hi

Jew mi ihi a, Gentail mi ihi zongin, sila ihi a, sila a hilo ihi zongin, eite minam tuamtuam ihih hangin Kha Siangtho khat bek mah in Jesuh' pumpi a suak dingin ama sungah hong phum a, eite khempeuh tungah a hong kipia pen tua a kibang Kha Siangtho khat bek mah ahi hi
Pumpi in na khat bek neiloin nam tampi tak a nei hi
Khe in, “Kei, khut hilo ka hih manin pumpi tawh ka kizom kei hi,” a cihmawk hangin pumpi na khat ahihna a bei hi tuanlo hi
Bil in, “Kei, mit hilo ka hih manin pumpi tawh ka kizom kei hi,” a cihmawk hangin pumpi na ahihna a bei hi tuanlo hi
Pumpi khempeuh mit suakkhin leh bang tawh khua za ding ahi hiam? Pumpi khempeuh bil suakkhin leh bang tawh a gimnam thei ding ahi hiam
Ahi zongin tu-a i neih bang tektekin, Pasian in ama deih bangin pumpi na a tuamtuam a hong bawlsak hi
A vekpi-in pumpi na nam khat bek hi khin leh a pumpi ding koi-ah om nawn ding ahi hiam
Ahi zongin tu-a i neih bangin pumpi khat bek om a, na tampi a nei hi
Tua ahih manin mit in khut kiangah, “Nang ka hong kisam kei hi,” ci theilo a, lutang in zong khe kiangah, “Nang ka hong kisapna omlo hi,” ci theilo hi
Pumpi na a ginalo tawh a kibangte a kiman'na lian mahmah zawsop a
pumpi na bangmah gentaaklo i sakte pawl limtakin kep kul zawsop hi. I pumpi na hoih i sak khollohte pen
pumpi na hoih i sakte i lim et ding a kisap kholloh bang hiloin, limkep diak peuh kulzaw se hi. Ahi zongin i pumpi na thupi i sak khollohte limtakin i kepdiak ding a kisamin i pumpi a na bawl se hi
Tua ahih manin i pumpi nate khatlekhat kithutuak lo cih omloin a vekpi-in a kilemkim uh hi
Khat in natna ngah leh a vekpi-un thuakkhawm uh a, khat in pahtakna ngah leh a vekpi-un lungdam khawm uh hi
Tu-in note khempeuh pen Khrih pumpi na hi uh a, na vekpi-un a pumpi na khat ciat na hi uh hi

Tua ahih manin Pasian in pawlpi sungah mi khempeuh ama pan'mun ciat dingah a hong bulh hi. A masa-in sawltakte, a nihna-ah kamsangte, a thumna-ah laihilhte, tua ciangin na lamdang bawltheite, cina damsak theite, midang a huhtheite, thu vaihawm a siamte, leh pau lamdang a pau theite ahi uh hi
A vekpi-un sawltak hilo a, a vekpi-un kamsang zong hilo uh hi. A vekpi-un laihilh, thuhilh hilo uh a, a vekpi-un na lamdang zong bawllo uh hi
A vekpi-un cina damsakna ding siamna neilo uh a, a vekpi-un pau lamdang pau theilo uh a, a vekpi-un tua pau lamdangte a khiatna gen theilo uh hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian' hong piak siamna a hoihpente deih belin na nei ta un.
